{"db_name": "support", "query": "SELECT c.issueid__c, i.name
FROM "Case" c
JOIN issue__c i ON c.issueid__c = i.id
WHERE c.orderitemid__c IN (SELECT Id FROM OrderItem WHERE Product2Id = '01tWt000006hV8LIAU')
  AND c.createddate >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '5 months')
GROUP BY c.issueid__c, i.name
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MAX(count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS count
        FROM "Case"
        WHERE orderitemid__c IN (SELECT Id FROM OrderItem WHERE Product2Id = '01tWt000006hV8LIAU')
        AND createddate >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '5 months')
        GROUP BY issueid__c
    ) AS counts
)
LIMIT 1;"}
